description: This repository provides a Python-based framework to simulate realistic MOSFET I-V characteristics and generate challenging datasets for machine learning experiments. It models Healthy, Degraded, and Failed MOSFETs with realistic noise, variability, and non-ideal effects, making it ideal for testing ML algorithms for device health classification.
A comprehensive framework for evaluating the ethical implications of machine learning models, focusing on fairness, explainability, and accountability.
Machine learningbased framework for analyzing financial datasets and generating data-driven investment recommendations across multiple domains.

AlphaFlow ML & DL Trading Bot is an end-to-end machine learning and deep learning trading framework for MetaTrader 5. It covers data loading, feature engineering, model training/tuning, backtesting with vectorbt, and live deploymentall in one repository.
An orchestration framework for End-to-End Machine Learning Serving with Resource Optimization on Heterogeneous Edge
An opinionated machine learning framework.

Open-source Python GUI implementing the MeaningFlux analytical framework for eddy covariance data: standardized visualization, gap-filling, footprint/fetch metrics, machine-learning predictability, and information-theoretic diagnostics.
A Hybrid Machine Learning and Foundation Model Framework for Multi-Market Agricultural Price Forecasting in India with Weather-Integrated Agriculture Analytics

A phishing detection framework that utilizes machine learning, adversarial training, and multi-modal feature extraction. It analyzes various data sources, including URLs, HTML, metadata, and user behavior, while leveraging GAN-generated samples to protect against adversarial attacks.

MindAI is an enterprise-grade, AI-powered mental health platform. It combines clinical psychological frameworks (PHQ-9) with machine learning (Scikit-learn) to predict burnout and provide personalized behavioral interventions. Built with a scalable microservices architecture using Django, PostgreSQL, and React.

A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

This repository contains the implementation of the research paper titled Comparative Performance of Machine Learning Regressors for Wind Power Forecasting: A Diagnostic Framework. The study utilizes wind turbine SCADA data to perform a diagnostic analysis using baseline regression models
Machine Learning-Based Classification Framework for Detecting Fraudulent Cryptocurrency Platforms using URL and Domain Intelligence: Using CryptoScamDB & PhiUSIIL
ATLAS : Auditable Trust Layer for AI Systems, A Protocol Framework for Leakage-Resilient Machine Learning Evaluation

Collection of applied AI projects covering Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Transformers, Computer Vision, and NLP. Demonstrates practical system building including chatbots, recommendation engines, data analysis, and model training using modern AI tools and frameworks.
Phishing website detection using machine learning with a Weighted Hybrid Score framework

An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

This project proposes a decentralized machine learning framework where multiple financial institutions collaboratively train a credit scoring model without sharing raw customer data, ensuring privacy, transparency, and fairness in financial decision-making.
Machine Learning based framework for estimation of Effective Population Size(Ne) from genetic summary statistics
Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework

A structured Artificial Intelligence learning repository containing hands-on experiments, machine learning implementations, AI notebooks, and beginner-to-advanced projects built with Python, Scikit-learn, and deep learning frameworks.
Machine learning-based classification framework for detecting spatially extended and diffuse emission in the high redshift universe, using multi-band broadband imaging.

Machine learning framework for early detection of major bleeding in acute leukemia using temporal laboratory features and cross-dataset validation. Includes preprocessing, model training, evaluation, and visualization pipelines.
A production-grade framework for Differential Privacy and Synthetic Data Generation in Machine Learning pipelines.

AutoGluon-based Automated Machine Learning framework for highway subsidence forecasting in abandoned mine areas. Implements time-series feature engineering (lags, rolling stats, differencing) and deep stacked ensembles for mining-induced settlement prediction.

Capstone project for the Imperial College London AI & Machine Learning Certificate, showcasing end-to-end ML development  from data preparation to model training, evaluation, and insights using Python and modern ML frameworks.

"Cyber-resilient machine learning framework for accurate individual load forecasting and anomaly detection in smart grids", Nature, December 2025.

Collection of machine learning projects spanning healthcare prediction, business analytics, and NLP - built with Python, scikit-learn, and deep learning frameworks.

An end-to-end Machine Learning Quantitative Trading framework designed for the Vietnam Stock Market, featuring strict Walk-Forward validation and realistic bt engine backtesting

A machine learning framework, dataset and research sub-module about coevolutionary planetary intelligence dynamics. This project explores how nurturing its emergent patterns may lead to a synergistic increase in the overall capability and intelligence of both individual agents and the collective system.

This repository contains all Machine Learning codes and notebooks covered in the Semester 6 curriculum, including fundamental concepts, model implementations, experiments, and practice exercises using Python and popular machine learning frameworks.
This is a python package to reproduce the results for a paper entitled : "A Machine Learning Framework for Turbofan Health Estimation via Inverse Problem Formulation"
An Explainable Machine Learning-Based Framework for Fault Prediction and Isolation in Telecommunication Networks

An advanced threat detection framework that integrates signature-based matching with machine learning anomaly detection to identify zero-day vulnerabilities. It features a distributed ML pipeline utilizing secure aggregation for privacy-preserving intelligence sharing and custom-built parsers to normalize logs

This repository provides the code for the study Estimating Immune Age from B-Cell Receptor Repertoire Using Machine Learning. It implements an end-to-end framework for extracting multi-dimensional bulk BCR repertoire features and training machine learning models to quantify immunosenescence.
An end-to-end context-aware ML framework for predicting U.S. airline delays using ensemble learning, SHAP, and DiCE counterfactuals

A Predictive Machine Learning Framework for Early Detection of Slow Learners using the XGBoost algorithm. Analyzes academic indicators such as to identify those who are at risk early. An interactive dashboard allows educators to input student data and receive predictions for timely academic intervention.
The Sentinel Framework builds on this progress by adding biometric authentication and machine learning to captive portals, aiming to provide secure and password-free network access.

Designed a simple machine learning model that predicts the loan from bank based on personal details.Created using python libraries like NumPy,Scikit-learn,Pandas and framework like Streamlit to buil web apps.

VectorForge ML is a modular machine learning framework built from scratch in C++, designed for performance and extensibility. The project focuses on implementing core ML algorithms manually and gradually evolving into a high-performance research-grade engine with optional R integration.
An easy-to-use Python package implementing the machine learning framework presented in "Precision culturomics enabled by unlabeled single-cell morphology and Raman spectra"

A small project exploring the PyTorch machine learning framework

A research-ready federated learning simulation framework designed for edge AI research and education. This project demonstrates privacy-preserving machine learning where multiple devices collaboratively train a model without sharing raw data.
An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.
Machine Learning framework for proactive risk management. Predicts high-risk departments using operational data and ensemble methods (Random Forest, GBM)

First author and oral presenter of the research paper Machine Learning-Based Early Detection Framework for Alzheimers Disease at the IEEE IC3ECSBHI 2026 conference. The research focuses on using machine learning techniques for early detection of Alzheimers disease. Paper ID: 1663.

A hybrid image encryption framework fusing machine learning and chaotic cryptography. It utilizes ML to classify image blocks by information density, enabling adaptive selective encryption. Combining bit-plane manipulation, chaotic maps, and multiple S-boxes, it optimizes speed and security for real-time IoT and resource-constrained environments.

Astronomical machine learning framework with advanced data analysis and interactive 3D visualization capabilities.
An AI-powered Decision Intelligence Framework for UIDAI that detects security anomalies, predicts biometric exclusion risks, and maps migration trends using Machine Learning.
A lean Torch like C++ machine learning framework with multiple device acceleration support.

brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".
Physics-Informed Machine Learning Framework for Real-Time Drilling Fluid Rheology Prediction using Sensor Data and NavierStokes Constraints

In the rapidly evolving landscape of Internet of Things (IoT), ensuring the security of connected devices is of paramount importance. This project or Master's thesis aims to address this critical concern by proposing a robust framework for the classification of cyber attacks on IoT using advanced machine learning techniques.
An explainable machine learning framework for predicting aircraft engine Remaining Useful Life (RUL) using XGBoost and Temporal SHAP, with fidelity-based evaluation of feature importance.

My first Machine Learning model. PsLSM, which stands for Prediction Model For Large Sequence Of Numbers takes in 5 numbers and predicts which type of sequence it is and its common difference/ratio if it is AP/GP. Made with PyTorch framework

A Machine Learning framework using CatBoost to forecast branch  product level sales and margin outcomes. Includes scenario simulation, CFO-grade financial logic (Sales  GP%  GP  COGS), enterprise dataset modeling, and AI-driven strategic planning for retail and distribution networks.

SparseBank is a machine-learningassisted framework for reducing matched-filter template banks. By learning the object masses it allows to significantly reduce the CBC templates that preserve detection sensitivity while significantly lowering computational cost.

BreastCancer-AI: An Interpretable Machine Learning Framework for Breast Tumor Classification Using the Wisconsin Diagnostic Dataset

A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

Quanta Cure is an AI-driven drug discovery framework using Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to model molecular structures and predict proteinligand binding affinity. It integrates RDKit, PyTorch Geometric, and datasets like ChEMBL and PDBBind to build molecular graphs for machine learningbased drug candidate screening.

This repository contains supervised machine learning end to end model deployment steps through UI using streamlit framework

LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing  powered by big data and machine learning.

I specialize in systems-level machine learning, high-performance C++ development, transformer-based NLP, and scalable AI deployment. I build frameworks, optimize performance, and ship real-world AI systems  not just experiments.
